reviews.review_description: Love it
I was racing ai then a hacker joined and messed my car up

This VR racing game delivers two completely different but equally fantastic experiences—a fast-paced kart and a Fiat 500! Both vehicles handle smoothly, offering a solid and polished driving experience.

Drifting is made super easy and a ton of fun, adding to the excitement of every race. The game also gives you flexibility in how you drive, whether you prefer a steering wheel or controllers—it all works flawlessly.

If you’re looking for a VR racing game that’s versatile, fun, and expertly crafted, this one is a no-brainer.

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)
Great game really cool visuals nice cars too I enjoyed this

Game sucks honestly, when you go too turn using hands you have too constantly recalibrate every turn more than 90°. You gotta do really good in races too even progress. Rookie level aid are more of a champion. And if you get 1st place you only get 50 coins, hint, the cheapest go kart is 1000, you can figure out the actuall vehicle on your own.

reviews.review_title: Bro the drifting is so annoying 💀
reviews.review_description: I wanted to s****t myself every time I was in third and then at a nowhere when I take a small turn, the whole car turns around I hate that so much and the graphics in the ai the graphics are OK but how the heck is the ai all the way behind me and catches up to me and cuts me off like🙄 I know it’s a demo but like gosh I hate the drifting so much
The driving is okay. An extremely annoying thing was that the drift was cranked up to the maximum. Another problem is that the bots are extremely strong and can make you crash if they bump into you.

This is officially my first VR review. Much like my yelp profile I believe my words can impact someones job/future, and for that reason you must really impress me or terribly disappoint to receive my review. So here it is…
To find a racing game in VR that gives you a real world view without getting you sick is hard to do, but this game has done it. From the vibration levels to mechanics this game is a GEM! I have read reviews about the spin outs and crashes, well let me tell you I experienced it aswell. Untill I started using my brake, watch the other drivers, chose to take an outside corner, waited till lap 3 to pass anyone. This is the first racing game where the strategy and defensive drive really put you in the action. I felt myself drift from reality and into that drivers seat simply because of how hard I need to concentrate and cosistantly focus from start to finish. I can not wait to see what this would be like in multiplayer, and look forward to more from this incredible development team. 
Your doing an amazing job!
I flipped my car over in the grass and it just stayed flipped over. 😆 No re-spawn. I was wondering if I should get out and try to rock it back on it's wheels if I could.

I really like the game but there are some big issues, such as the AI and the fact that they are way to strong and can take you out of they touch you, and other thing is that there are some bugs with your head glitching through the roof of the car, and the manual transmission won’t work unless you grab it a certain way and ouch it all the way forward, the AI is my biggest concern because I haven’t been able to finish a race with out spinning out because one of them bumped me from behind, when I try to bump them, they don’t move at all and I still get spun out, it is just a demo, but these are gonna be big issues for the final project if they aren’t fixed now

developer_response.body:
Hi.  Thanks for playing the demo and providing feedback.  I will look into the AI collision issues you encountered.
Cheers.

Demo 1.5 is now available and hopefully addresses your concerns regarding the AI and manual transmission.
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Really like it. Could do with an option to adjust your seat position from the settings. Make this multiplayer and you will sell thousands. Stay single player and you will sell a couple of hundred. I hope you can do it. Great though.

developer_response.body:
Hi.  Thank you for your review.  I am currently working on adding Multiplayer so I hope you are right about selling thousands... ;-)  
I will look into the seat position adjustment - thanks for the heads-up.
Cheers

reviews.review_description: Great game
This game is really fun, I like the MK. It would be cool with online and more tracks though. Also, some new cool cars would be fun.

developer_response.body:
Many thanks.   I will be releasing version 1.4 soon which adds 4 more races in 2 new environments along with 3 new cars to try out.  I am also working on the full game and hope to include multiplayer.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Really nice relaxing driving, when you get that you not need to drift in most turns, you start to wn.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review.  Cheers.

reviews.review_description:
the first choice car, not a cute and slow car
select  kart race
kart racing, more people will be able to understand the appeal of this game.
I can't clear second demo track because back attack by AI. When my car turn 180 degree. Please fix weight simulation of car more heavy.
Watch the review at my channel : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d9gMPxxk_as

developer_response.body:
Hi!  Thank for your review, I'm glad you liked it.

When you enter the lobby at the start of the game look to the right and you will see instructions for using Virtual Steering (steering with your hands instead of the thumbstick).  Basically use Y to grab the wheel and X to recenter the wheel if it gets out of alignment with your controllers.

You can also enable manual gear shifting when selecting the car before entering the race and using the left and right grip buttons to change gear.

Also try selecting the 2 traffic races where you race against the 7 AI whilst driving through traffic.  With this and the manual gears and Virtual Steering it is a challenge and, in my opinion, great fun.

Once again, thank you for your review.
Cheers!

reviews.review_description: A really good game.. I love it 👍👍👍

After playing the demo for a while I Just bought the full release! Omg it actually feels like sim racing! Love it! To be honest the go karts feels so much like kartkraft which is a great sim on pc. This game is So good for being stand alone! Please keep the updates coming. Is there any chance of online servers coming?

developer_response.body:
Hi.  Thanks for buying the game.  Multiplayer is high on my to-do list.  Glad you're enjoying the game.

Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I originally purchased Grid Legends, for the purpose of acclimatising to virtual racing and conquering motion sickness. After trying this game though, I've requested a refund on GL. Really liking the virtual steering wheel, which makes the driving process much smoother, and realistic. And the install space of 645MB is a huge improvement on the 30GB required fire GL. The home screen environment is also nicely done. Very impressive demo and well done to the game developer!
